title: Vehicle%20Tracking%20System%20for%20Maktheshim%20Agan%20India%20Pvt%20Limited
content:
Dated: 20th May, 2014  
 
TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN  
 
This is to certify that Techno Brain has successfully implemented Vehicle 
Tracking System consisting of 115 tracking devices at Makhteshim -Agan India 
Pvt. Ltd . in 2013 -14. Techno Brain implemented the solution for us within the 
agreed time frames and the continued after sales support received from them 
has been satisfactory.  
During the project, consultants from Techno Brain demonstrated high levels of 
professionalism and thorough understanding of t he requirements which has 
helped us in achieving our objectives.  
We are happy to confirm that the solution is running successfully and we are 
satisfied with Techno Brain’s technical expertise and their commitment to adhere 
to high standards, delivery in t ime, ability to train and provide support to our 
staff.  
We appreciate the good work done by Techno Brain and do not hesitate to 
recommend them to any interested firm.  
 
Sincerely,  
For MAKHTESHIM – AGAN INDIA PVT. LTD.
